_comment: Historical AuditRecord[] used as input to the counterfactual policy bench.
_note: All records are for domain: training. Policy version pol-aabbccdd was active for records 1-3. Candidate pol-11223344 is being evaluated.

records.title: Training load audit — week 1
records.canonicalDeclaration:
STATE: load=HIGH, recovery=ADEQUATE, progression=STABLE
CONSTRAINTS: weekly_load <= 90%_1RM, session_rpe <= 8
OBJECTIVE: MAXIMIZE progression WITHIN constraints

records.title: Training load audit — week 2
records.canonicalDeclaration:
STATE: load=HIGH, recovery=LOW, progression=PLATEAUED
CONSTRAINTS: weekly_load <= 90%_1RM, session_rpe <= 8
OBJECTIVE: MAXIMIZE progression WITHIN constraints

records.title: Training load audit — week 3
records.canonicalDeclaration:
STATE: load=MODERATE, recovery=ADEQUATE, progression=IMPROVING
CONSTRAINTS: weekly_load <= 85%_1RM, session_rpe <= 7.5
OBJECTIVE: MAXIMIZE progression WITHIN constraints
